update:
Play Games Sidekick is Generally Available. 
 Learn more:  Play Games Sidekick

Play Games Services v2 Native SDK (beta) is available for you to test. 
 The v2 Native SDK (beta) supports the following features: 
 
 Platform authentication 
 Achievements 
 Recall 
 
 Learn more: 
 
 Get started with Play Games Services for C and C++ 
 Play Games Services C++ (v2) (beta) API reference

The updated game controllers documentation is now available. 
 Learn more:  Support game controllers

Play Games Sidekick (beta) is ready for you to test. 
 Learn more:  Play Games Sidekick (beta)

Google Play Games Level Up is a program to recognize and reward great gaming experiences across Google Play, providing you with powerful tools and promotional opportunities to drive business growth for your game. 
 Learn more:  Google Play Games | Level Up 
 Google Play Games Level Up+ is a program where you receive all the benefits outlined on the  Google Play Games Level Up  page and in addition you get exclusive premium benefits. 
 Learn more:  Google Play Games | Level Up+

The  Google Play Games (v1) plugin for Unity, version  0.10.15  update includes the following changes: 
 Following the deprecation of  Google Sign-in  API, we are deprecating the Games v1 SDK and APIs. 
 Important:  Starting in May 2026, the deprecated APIs will be removed from the SDK. Then, as early as July 2028, calls to these APIs will fail, even if you're using older versions of the SDK.

The  play-services-games (v24.0.0)   update includes the following changes: 
 Following the deprecation of  Google Sign-in  API, we are deprecating Games v1 SDK and APIs. 
 Important:  Starting in May 2026, the deprecated APIs will be removed from the SDK. Then, as early as July 2028, calls to these APIs will fail, even if you're using older versions of the SDK.

The    Google Play Games plugin for Unity, version 2.1.0  update includes the following changes: 
 
 Added support for additional auth scopes using  requestServerSideAccess . 
 Published the  Play Games Services Unity Plugin (v2) Reference  documentation.

The   Google Play Games plugin for Unity, version 2.1.0  update includes the following changes: 
 
 Removed the deprecated  Google Sign-In  dependency. 
 Removed the deprecated  Google Drive  dependency.

The   play-services-games-v2 (v21.0.0)  update includes the following changes: 
 
 Added support for additional auth scopes using  requestServerSideAccess . 
 Removed the deprecated  Google Sign-In  dependency. 
 Removed the deprecated  Google Drive  dependency.

The user can now request three basic OAuth 2.0 identity scopes with  GamesSignInClient  when requesting server-side access to Play Games Services web APIs. 
 For details, see: 
 
 Server-side access to Play Games Services

You can now import definitions and other metadata for multiple achievements together in a single step.  
 For details, see: 
 Achievements

Google Play Games plugin for Unity, version 2.0.0 supports  recall API . 
 For details, see: 
 
 Set up Google Play Games for Unity and sign-in
